reasonSummary: Activation fails because a governed exclusion rule blocks same-scope co-activation of contradictory orchard template packs.

problems.title: Same-precedence template conflict blocks activation
problems.detail: The requested pack is blocked by a governed exclusion rule because the already-active same-precedence orchard template is contradictory and no safe merge path exists.
problems.suggestedRemediation: Ship an explicit compatibility/merge artifact or revise one pack so the template constraint overlap is no longer contradictory.
